channel.title: Classes on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Classes on Nature Works

item.title: Learning chunks
item.description:
How about small chunks of iterative learning material for creating a wildlife forest garden?

I had been learning Welsh using SaySomethingIn.com, the language learning system was a small amount of spoken Welsh every day, so that you eventually start speaking without thinking, and you learn the writing later. http://localhost:1313/blog/240110-learning-chunks/

item.title: Classes
item.description:
New classes section in place and a renamed store

Ain’t no denying it, we are truly in a Nature and Climate Emergency. http://localhost:1313/blog/230501-classes/
